name: clarvia-mcp-server
description: AEO scoring and tool discovery platform for AI agents. Search 12,800+ indexed MCP servers, APIs, and CLIs with agent-readiness scores. Gate-check tools before use, compare alternatives, benchmark your toolchain, and submit quality feedback.

tools.name: search_services
tools.description: Search 12,800+ AI agent tools (MCP servers, APIs, CLIs) by keyword, category, or minimum score. Returns Clarvia AEO scores (0-100) indicating agent-readiness.

tools.name: scan_service
tools.description: Run a full AEO audit on any URL. Evaluates agent discoverability, API quality, documentation, and MCP readiness. Returns a score (0-100) with detailed breakdown.

tools.name: get_service_details
tools.description: Get the full AEO evaluation report for a previously scanned service. Shows detailed scoring breakdown across documentation, API design, error handling, auth, and MCP support.

tools.name: list_categories
tools.description: List all tool categories in the Clarvia directory with service counts per category.

tools.name: get_stats
tools.description: Get aggregate statistics for the Clarvia directory — total indexed services, average AEO score, score distribution, and category breakdown.

tools.name: register_service
tools.description: Submit a new AI tool, MCP server, API, or CLI for Clarvia indexing and AEO scoring. The service will be queued for automated scanning.

tools.name: clarvia_gate_check
tools.description: Quick pass/fail safety check before calling any external tool. Returns an agent grade (AGENT_NATIVE / AGENT_FRIENDLY / AGENT_POSSIBLE / AGENT_HOSTILE).

tools.name: clarvia_batch_check
tools.description: Batch-check up to 10 service URLs in a single call. Returns pass/fail and agent grade for each URL.

tools.name: clarvia_find_alternatives
tools.description: Find higher-rated alternative tools in a given category, ranked by agent-readiness score.

tools.name: clarvia_probe
tools.description: Run a live accessibility probe — checks HTTP reachability, response latency, OpenAPI spec, MCP server-card, and agents.json endpoint.

tools.name: clarvia_submit_feedback
tools.description: Report the outcome after using a tool (success/failure/partial) to contribute to Clarvia's community-driven reliability dataset.

tools.name: register_my_setup
tools.description: Register your agent's current tool setup to get AEO scores and category rankings for each tool in your toolchain.

tools.name: compare_my_setup
tools.description: Compare your registered tool setup against higher-scored alternatives in each category.

tools.name: recommend_upgrades
tools.description: Get personalized tool recommendations based on your registered setup. Suggests high-scoring tools you don't have yet.

tools.name: clarvia_report_issue
tools.description: Report a bug, request a feature, ask a question, or flag a security issue with Clarvia or any indexed tool.

tools.name: clarvia_list_issues
tools.description: List existing CS tickets — check status of previously reported issues or track your submitted tickets.
